_comment: Per-NEW-crate cargo-public-api baseline per seq-minor-5. This file is the seed baseline at G16-A wave-6 canary landing time. The `cargo-public-api` workflow (or its successor at G20-A3 wave-8a §7.3.A.9) will populate the structured surface entries on the next push that includes the workflow. Until then, this placeholder serves as the file-existence pin per `tests/cargo_public_api_drift_un_ignored` (G20-A3 wave-8a) + the per-NEW-crate ownership commitment.
_surfaces: variant errors::AtriumTransportError::PeerConnectFailed { peer: String, reason: String, relay_side: bool }
pub fn errors::AtriumTransportError::code(&self) -> ErrorCode [maps to E_ATRIUM_RELAY_UNREACHABLE / E_ATRIUM_TRANSPORT_DEGRADED per net-blocker-2]
pub struct peer_id::PeerId [Clone, Copy, Debug, Eq, Hash, PartialEq, Ord, PartialOrd, Serialize, Deserialize, transparent 32-byte Ed25519 pubkey == iroh EndpointId per crypto-minor-4]
pub struct peer_id::PeerIdDecodeError { pub reason: String } [thiserror::Error]
pub struct handshake_wire::HandshakeFrame { version: u8, peer_did: Did, device_did: Did, peer_id: PeerId, protocol_payload: Vec<u8> } [Clone, Debug, Eq, PartialEq, Serialize, Deserialize]
pub fn handshake_wire::HandshakeFrame::builder() -> HandshakeFrameBuilder<NoPeerDid, NoDeviceDid, NoPeerId>
pub struct handshake_wire::HandshakeFrameBuilder<P, D, K> [type-state pattern enforces both-DIDs-required at construction per net-blocker-4 BLOCKER]
pub fn handshake_wire::HandshakeFrameBuilder<_, NoDeviceDid, _>::device_did(self, did: Did) -> HandshakeFrameBuilder<_, WithDeviceDid, _>
pub fn handshake_wire::HandshakeFrameBuilder<_, _, NoPeerId>::peer_id(self, peer_id: PeerId) -> HandshakeFrameBuilder<_, _, WithPeerId>
pub fn handshake_wire::HandshakeFrameBuilder<WithPeerDid, WithDeviceDid, WithPeerId>::build(self) -> HandshakeFrame [ONLY this type-state has build()]
pub enum transport::TransportKind { Direct, Relay, Loopback } [Clone, Copy, Debug, Eq, PartialEq]
pub enum transport::TransportStatus { Healthy { kind }, Degraded { reason }, NotConnected } [Clone, Debug, Eq, PartialEq]
pub fn transport::Endpoint::mark_degraded(&self, reason: impl Into<String>) [async]
pub fn transport::Endpoint::simulate_packet_loss(&self, fraction: f32) [async; test-fixture path per net-blocker-2]
pub fn transport::Endpoint::connect(&self, remote: PeerId) -> AtriumTransportResult<Connection> [async]
_dependencies: benten-id (workspace path) — Ed25519 keypair + Did per net-minor-2 + ds-8 + crypto-minor-4
serde + serde_ipld_dagcbor + serde_bytes — DAG-CBOR canonical-bytes per CLAUDE.md baked-in #5
iroh = 0.98 (cfg-gated [target.'cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))'.dependencies] per CLAUDE.md baked-in #17) — QUIC transport core, tls-ring
_forbidden_dependencies: benten-engine — per arch-r1-11 + D-PHASE-3-14 (engine consumes sync, never reverse)
benten-eval — per arch-r1-11 + D-PHASE-3-14 (eval consumes sync, never reverse)
_pin_sources: net-minor-2 + ds-8 + crypto-minor-4 (peer-id deterministic from Ed25519 pubkey)
net-blocker-4 BLOCKER (peer-handshake metadata carries peer-DID AND device-DID)
scope-real-10 (CI-conditional gating for holepunch / relay-fallback fixtures)
cag-2 + cag-r4-3 (no persistent state at G16-A canary scope; G16-B/D wave-6b lands)

G16-B (Loro CRDT): consumes transport::Connection::send_bytes / recv_bytes for sync-replica delivery
G16-C (MST diff + light-client): consumes transport::Connection for MST diff exchange
lands crates/benten-sync/src/mst.rs + mst_proto.rs + light_client.rs (NOT in this PR)
un-ignores tests/mst_diff.rs / tests/mst_revocation_priority.rs / tests/light_client.rs / tests/light_client_distinct.rs / tests/prop_mst.rs
G16-D (DID handshake protocol body + pee: consumes handshake_wire::HandshakeFrame as the on-the-wire envelope
consumes transport::Endpoint::accept_next / connect for handshake-state-machine wiring
lands crates/benten-sync/src/handshake.rs + peer_discovery.rs (NOT in this PR)
